narrative:
Cols 10-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,369 registered voters, with 61.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.9%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.2 percentage points.
